Metadata.title: D-ALabs · A small lab for AI, data, and cloud
Metadata.description: D-ALabs is a small lab that builds production-grade AI, data, and cloud systems. We turn ideas into shipped, measurable work.

Home.heroLede: We build with AI, data, and cloud — engineering systems that ship, measure, and improve. A small lab doing serious work.
Home.expertiseMeta: Three disciplines, practiced together. Research-grade thinking, production-grade engineering — shipped through experimentation, measured in outcomes.

ai.title: AI Strategy
ai.desc: From proof-of-concept to production. Applied AI for your actual problem — not the latest hype cycle.

data.title: Data Platform
data.desc: End-to-end ingestion, processing, and visualization. The foundation everything else runs on.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture
cloud.desc: Scalable, reliable infrastructure for growth. Flexible underneath, predictable on the surface.

Home.productsMeta: Real products, in production. Each one tackles a different shape of work — language, image, voice, value.

signgpt.desc: An AI-powered sign language translation engine that removes the barrier between hearing and Deaf communities. Real-time recognition and translation, on-device.

lembic.desc: An AI-driven creation suite for creators and businesses. Start with one idea — generate images, video, and copy in a single workflow.

Home.processMeta: Four phases. A repeatable process for turning raw possibility into something durable. We name the stages after the Magnum Opus — not as ornament, but as a way to be honest about which phase the work is in.

nigredo.title: Discover
nigredo.desc: Understand the business. Find the actual problem buried beneath the request. Challenge assumptions.

albedo.title: Refine
albedo.desc: Distill complexity into a focused approach. Cut anything the work can survive without.

citrinitas.title: Transmute
citrinitas.desc: Engineer with rigor — AI, data, cloud. Make the abstract concrete; make the concrete operational.

rubedo.title: Deliver
rubedo.desc: Ship measurable, sustainable outcomes. Outcomes that compound, not consume.

Home.ctaSub: Tell us about your project. We'll propose the right approach within a week.

Services.heroLede: Every project goes through our four-phase process. The disciplines below describe what we actually build — and how we work across them.

ai.title: AI Strategy
ai.subtitle: Sulfur — the intelligence layer
ai.intro: AI is most useful when it sits inside a system designed for it. We scope, build, and operationalize AI capabilities that pay rent — measured, evaluated, and improving over time.

offerings.v: Discovery workshops, opportunity sizing, build-vs-buy analysis.
Retrieval, agents, structured outputs, tool use — production-ready.
Custom evals, red-teaming, observability for prompts and chains.
SFT, DPO, domain-specific adaptation when generic isn't enough.

data.title: Data Platform
data.subtitle: Salt — the foundation
data.intro: Without clean data, nothing downstream is real. We design platforms that move data reliably from source to insight — with the kind of quiet dependability that lets the interesting work happen on top.

offerings.v: Batch and streaming ingestion, schema enforcement, lineage.
Modeling for analytics and ML — Snowflake, BigQuery, Iceberg.
Semantic layers, dashboards your team will actually open.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture
cloud.subtitle: Mercury — the connective layer
cloud.intro: The infrastructure layer where everything actually runs. We design for the load you have today and the one you'll have in two years — without paying for either of them right now.

offerings.v: Greenfield design or methodical migration from legacy.
Terraform, Pulumi, GitOps — infra you can review like code.
SLOs, distributed tracing, incident response that learns.
Finding the 80% of your bill that drives 20% of your value.

Services.engagementMeta: Most projects fit one of these. We're happy to mix and match.

discovery.label: Discovery Sprint
discovery.desc: Workshops, stakeholder interviews, technical due diligence. You leave with a written roadmap, not slides.

build.label: Build Engagement
build.desc: A focused build of a specific capability — model, pipeline, platform module — shipped to production.

embedded.label: Embedded Lab
embedded.desc: A small, senior team that sits inside yours — for compounding problems that don't end at delivery.

Services.ctaTitleA: Tell us what you're trying to
Services.ctaSub: We'll propose the right approach within a week.

About.heroLede: D-ALabs was founded on a simple premise: the most valuable software is built by small teams who care about both the problem and the craft. We work on a few things at a time, and we work on them deeply.

substance.d: A demo isn't a product. Production is the only honest measure of whether the work actually works.

deeply.d: We turn away more work than we take on. The lab stays small so attention stays high.

senior.d: No junior bench. Every person on your project has shipped this kind of work before.

compound.d: We design every system so next year's team inherits leverage, not legacy.

About.teamMeta: A core team of engineers and researchers. We grow slowly, and only when the work demands it.

establishment.v: Suite 1140, 190 Wirye-daero, Hanam-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea

About.ctaSub: Open positions and partnership inquiries land at the same address.

News.heroLede: Engineering notes, research findings, product releases — and the occasional essay on building things that last.

items.title: SignGPT 2.0 — on-device, end-to-end, in eight languages
items.excerpt: Our sign language translation engine moves to fully on-device inference, adds six new source languages, and ships a redesigned mobile experience.

items.title: Distilled agents — when a smaller model beats the frontier
items.excerpt: A short note on production agent systems where a fine-tuned 8B model outperforms a frontier model at one-twentieth the cost.

items.title: Lembic AI raises seed round, opens to creator partners
items.excerpt: Lembic AI, our digital content creation platform, has closed its seed round and is opening early access to a curated cohort of creators.

items.title: A pragmatic data platform on Iceberg — twelve months in
items.excerpt: We rebuilt a client's analytics stack on Iceberg, dbt, and a dash of Trino. Twelve months later — what worked and what didn't.

items.title: D-ALabs joins the Korea AI Alliance
items.excerpt: We've joined the Korea AI Alliance to contribute to open evaluation standards for Korean-language LLMs.

items.title: A new design language for D-ALabs
items.excerpt: We rebuilt our visual identity around the metaphor that's always sat behind the work — alchemy as a discipline for turning complexity into value.

Community.heroLede: We host meetups, study groups, and open lab nights for engineers, researchers, and operators working on AI, data, and the systems that connect them.

programs.title: Lab Nights
programs.desc: Monthly open evenings at our Hanam office. Talks, demos, and unstructured time. Bring something you're building.

programs.title: Convocation
programs.desc: A small, invite-only working session on a single applied AI problem. Capped at thirty practitioners.

programs.title: Study Circles
programs.desc: Reading groups around a single paper, system, or codebase. Three weeks, one Slack channel, one written summary.

programs.title: The Alembic
programs.desc: Our annual single-day conference on production AI. No keynote sponsors, no booths — just work.

programs.title: Office Hours
programs.desc: Forty-five minute slots with our practitioners, free, for early-stage technical founders working on hard problems.

programs.title: Common Tooling
programs.desc: A small set of evaluation harnesses, dbt macros, and Terraform modules we maintain in the open.

Community.upcomingMeta: All times KST. Registration is free; seats are limited.

upcoming.title: Production agents — failure modes we keep seeing
D-ALabs annual conference · single-track, single day

Community.ctaSub: We send one short note when something new is on the calendar.

hero.lede: A dedicated support portal is still in the works. For now, email us and a practitioner will respond personally.

form.title: Get in Touch
form.subtitle: Send us a message and we'll respond promptly.
